title: GlaxoSmithKline India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: GlaxoSmithKline India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
GlaxoSmithKline India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About GlaxoSmithKline India:
GlaxoSmithKline India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GlaxoSmithKline India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
